title: Super Pistons
description: 🤜🧰 Move chests or enchanting tables with super pistons !
body:
# Super Pistons

Introducing **Super Pistons**, they can push block entities* & blocks, but in return they have a push limit of 3 blocks.

_Note: existing vanilla pistons were not changed, and they function just like in vanilla_ ## Features: > **Get over here !** You can push block entities without touching your precious items

> A non exhaustive list of block entities* that can be pushed. _They should work with other mods that adds block entities* too !_

_*Block Entities: These are blocks that contains data, like chest, hoppers, enchanting table, ect.._
